title: AGP real-time decision response (Flow C, L3)
description: Synchronous decision response from the plane to a vendor. v0.1.

decision_request_id.description: MUST match the request's decision_request_id. Plane MUST NOT respond to a request id it has already responded to.

decision.description: Real-time decisions are binary; logged_only is not a valid Flow C response.

ttl_seconds.description: Vendor MAY cache this decision for up to ttl_seconds for an identical proposed_action. Default 0 (no caching).
